payload.answer: There is a potential temporal status conflict. Existing state says the Brain Slack agent is planned and open, while the new statement says the Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented. This may mean the new statement supersedes the older planned/open status, or it may mean the MVP milestone is implemented while the broader Brain Slack agent project remains open. Safe actions available: approve_supersession, keep_both, reject_new, or edit.
